sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46910" key="h)litenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠλῐτενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n46910.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lofty</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πέτρα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἠλίβατος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
